title: ISic030062. Contract for the sale of houses
body:
Text encoding: Randall Souza
1Ἐπὶ Θέωνος ..Α
2οἰκίας ὠν̣εῖται πέ[ντε]
3Παντίμε Λυκίσκου .
4Φίν̣των Λυκί[σ]κου φυλακ[ός]
5Σ[ω]σ̣ί̣ας Φιλωνίδας
6Ἡρα̣[κ]λείδας Ἄν̣τα[λλος]

Text encoding: Randall Souza
1ΕΠΙΘΕΩΝΟΣ··Α
2ΟΙΚΙΑΣΩ.ΕΙΤΑΙΠΕ[...]
3ΠΑΝΤΙΜΕΛΥΚΙΣΚΟΥ·
4ΦΙ.ΤΩΝΛΥΚΙ[.]ΚΟΥΦΥΛΑΚ[..]
5Σ[.]..ΑΣΦΙΛΩΝΙΔΑΣ
6ΗΡ.[.]ΛΕΙΔΑΣΑ.ΤΑ[....]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Previous editions are Manganaro's ed. pr. in PP 1989, and Dubois in IGDS II no. 56. This text and the apparatus are copied from Souza 2022 in ZPE;
  • 1: [Ἐπὶ---], Manganaro. Neither M. nor Dubois read any letters on my Line 1, and M. inserts an additional unrestored line (dashes) between my Lines 1 and 2; [τὸ ἥμισσον τᾶ]ς οἰκίας, M. and D. but no sigma is visible on the sheet; πέ[ντε ταλάντων?], M.
  • 3: [Ἄμποχοι] Παντίας, M. and D.; Λυκίσκου Λ̣, M.
  • 4: Φυ̣λα̣κ[ός?], M. The upsilon after the phi is unusual: it is reversed compared to the other upsilons, i.e. the short part is on the right; also the more vertical hasta is extremely long and runs down into the next line.
  • 5: [---]Φιλωνίδας[---], M. and D.
  • 6: [---]ΑΣΙΔΑΣ̣Λ .. ? .. Τ[---], M.

English translation

Randall Souza

When Theon was in office...Pantime, daughter of Lykiskos...buys five houses...Phinton, son of Lykiskos, guardian...Sosias, Philonidas...Herakleidas, Antallos...

commentary

The engraving of this brief contract is extremely light and difficult to read. The list of names at the end, headed by the brother of the buyer (who is designated as the "guardian" of his sister, who could not transact business independently), likely comprises the guarantors of the contract.

bibliography

  • 39.1011 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • Manganaro 1989 209 Morg. V, fig.8 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002637
  • Dubois 2008 56 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000160
  • 2022 Souza 78 no.3, fig. 5 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002688

Angular omicron, four-bar sigma, two-bar upsilon, hastae on the right of alpha, lambda, and mu extend above the intersection with the hastae on the left.

3 not recorded
Licensed under a Creative Commons-Attribution 4.0 licence
